text: What if I told you ants make decisions without a boss? Ant colonies thrive on swarm intelligence, where each ant follows simple rules. They communicate through pheromones, guiding decisions without a hierarchy. In experiments, groups of ants find food based on local interactions, not orders. Imagine solving complex problems by simply following your instincts! This decentralized decision-making leads to smarter outcomes—no boss required. Want to learn more about the wonders of nature? Like and follow for more!
